assets.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: 1:1 square ecommerce template preview, high-information product overview calibration
Input images:
- Image 1 is an INFORMATION-STRUCTURE REFERENCE ONLY. Learn its bold title hierarchy, dense explanatory layout, large central product, and four surrounding image-plus-copy modules. Do not copy its brand, logo, artwork, numbers, claims, text, or exact product.
- Image 2 is the PRODUCT-IDENTITY REFERENCE ONLY. Preserve the same blank unbranded deep navy structured baseball cap: six-panel cotton twill, curved brim, tonal navy stitching, small tonal eyelets, and a simple brass-color adjustable rear buckle.
Primary request: Create a premium, highly legible ecommerce infographic that lets a buyer understand the cap at a glance. It must feel as information-rich as Image 1 while using only the exact safe copy listed below.
Scene/backdrop: clean warm-white studio canvas with pale-gray dividers and restrained dark-navy accents.
Subject: one large blank unbranded deep navy cap, physically realistic, no front embroidery or patch. Add three smaller color-option product variants at the bottom: charcoal gray, muted olive, and warm sand, all identical in shape and construction and all blank.
Style/medium: photorealistic high-end ecommerce product photography integrated into a disciplined commercial infographic.
Composition/framing:
- Top band: one large bold title and one smaller subtitle.
- Center: the main cap occupies 40%–50% of the square canvas, fully recognizable.
- Four surrounding modules, two on each side. Every module must contain a distinct photographic crop or detail image AND its two-line label/description.
- Bottom band: the color-options label above three clearly separated color variants.
- Effective information content fills about 80% of the canvas without overlap.
Lighting/mood: bright neutral softbox photography, crisp fabric texture, controlled natural shadows.
Typography: bold condensed sans-serif title; clean sans-serif labels; descriptions smaller but clearly readable; black and deep navy text on warm white.
Text (verbatim, render exactly once each, and render no other words):
"BUILT FOR EVERYDAY WEAR"
"A structured cap with practical details for daily use"
"SIX-PANEL CROWN"
"Clean structured profile"
"CURVED BRIM"
"Multi-row edge stitching"
"METAL BUCKLE"
"Easy fit adjustment"
"COTTON TWILL"
"Visible woven texture"
"EVERYDAY COLOR OPTIONS"
Module mapping:
- SIX-PANEL CROWN with a crown construction crop.
- CURVED BRIM with a brim stitching crop.
- METAL BUCKLE with a rear buckle crop.
- COTTON TWILL with a woven fabric macro.
Constraints: square 1:1; at least four image-plus-description modules; at least five visible label areas; more than 25 clear English words using only the supplied copy; three color variants; main cap 40%–50%; effective visual content about 80%; exact text; no extra words or characters; no brand; no logo; no front graphic; no certification; no MOQ; no lead-time claim; no numbers; no watermark.
Avoid: copying BOFITCAP, mountain artwork, badges, patches, 20+, 3-5 DAYS, OEM, ODM, certification marks, fake statistics, gibberish, duplicated modules, text touching edges, tiny illegible copy, malformed caps, sparse photography-only layout.

Use case: text-localization
Asset type: 1:1 square ecommerce template preview, targeted completeness correction
Input images:
- Image 1 is an INFORMATION-STRUCTURE REFERENCE ONLY; do not copy its brand, logo, wording, numbers, or promises.
- Image 2 is the approved PRODUCT-IDENTITY REFERENCE for the blank deep navy six-panel cotton-twill cap with curved brim, tonal stitching, and brass-color rear buckle.
- Image 3 is the EDIT TARGET. Preserve its current title, subtitle, main cap, four photographic benefit cards, exact copy, typography, colors, and commercial layout.
Primary request: Correct only one omission in Image 3: create a slim, clearly readable footer band and add the exact missing text "DESIGNED FOR DAILY ROUTINES". Rebalance vertical spacing slightly if necessary so the footer fits without covering any existing card or sentence.
Text (verbatim, all must remain present exactly once, and no other words may appear):
"PRACTICAL DETAILS, CLEARLY SHOWN"
"Every visible feature supports comfortable everyday wear"
"STRUCTURED CROWN"
"Keeps a clean daily profile"
"CURVED BRIM"
"Shapes natural shade around the face"
"COTTON TWILL"
"Shows a visible woven texture"
"ADJUSTABLE BUCKLE"
"Supports an easy personal fit"
"DESIGNED FOR DAILY ROUTINES"
Constraints: change only spacing and the new footer; preserve all four image-plus-copy modules; square 1:1; keep content density around 80%; exact legible text; no extra words; no brand; no logo; no numbers; no certification; no MOQ; no lead time; no watermark.
Avoid: deleting or rewriting existing text, replacing product photographs, duplicating modules, shrinking copy until illegible, adding icons or claims.

Lighting/mood: soft natural morning daylight with consistent color and realistic skin and fabric.
Typography: bold clean title, compact uppercase scene labels, readable sentence descriptions.

"Curved brim frames natural daylight"
"COFFEE BREAK"
"Structured shape keeps a clean look"
